title: Sundog
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Sundog_crv.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''Sundog 2'' under assault by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing]].]]
'''''Sundog''''' referred to a pair of Corellian [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] that served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|fleet]]. They were assigned to bring fresh troops to the defecting Imperial [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]] aboard his [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']]. They were, however, destroyed with all hands by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] [[Ace/Legends|ace]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] before reinforcements could arrive.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
